hooks.command: file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [[ "$file" == *.rs ]]; then crate_dir=$(dirname "$file"); while [[ ! -f "$crate_dir/Cargo.toml" ]] && [[ "$crate_dir" != "/" ]]; do crate_dir=$(dirname "$crate_dir"); done; pkg=$(grep '^name' "$crate_dir/Cargo.toml" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)"/\1/'); if [[ -n "$pkg" ]] && [[ "$pkg" != "kernel_uefi" ]] && [[ "$pkg" != "kernel_aarch64" ]]; then cargo clippy -p "$pkg" -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; fi

file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [[ "$file" == *Cargo.lock ]] || [[ "$file" == *.generated.rs ]]; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files or generated code directly. Use cargo for lock files and just codegen for generated code.' >&2; exit 2; fi

file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [[ "$file" == *CONSTITUTION.md ]]; then echo 'BLOCK: CONSTITUTION.md is an invariant document. Changes require explicit user approval and a DECISIONS.md entry.' >&2; exit 2; fi
